Opening checklist: unlock, lights, barbicide jars filled, playlist on, POS open, appointment board reviewed.
Closing checklist: sweep every station, sanitize clippers, count drawer, back up Square totals, lock both doors.
Fade SOP: establish the guideline, work up in guard steps, blur with the lever, detail with the T-outliner.
Beard SOP: shape first with the trimmer, define the cheek and neck line, hot towel, finish with oil.
Hot-towel shave SOP: pre-shave oil, towel, lather, with-the-grain pass, re-lather, against-the-grain, cold towel.
Sanitation log: barbicide changed daily, blades sprayed between clients, capes laundered nightly.
Apprentice curriculum — Week 1-4: clipper control, guard theory, neckline discipline on the mannequin.
Apprentice curriculum — Week 5-8: guideline placement, first live tapers with James checking each pass.
Apprentice curriculum — Week 9-12: blending, the lever blur, edge-up precision, client communication.
Apprentice curriculum — Month 4-6: solo lineups, beard work, speed under supervision.
Ty progress note: taper control is solid, blending is coming, still rushing the neckline — slow it down.
Ty progress note: first solo skin fade came out clean, client happy, ready for the checkpoint review.
Equipment log: Wahl Magic Clip serviced, blade aligned, oiled; Oster backup on the shelf.
Equipment log: chair 2 hydraulic slow to rise, contractor quote pending, use chair 3 meanwhile.
Playlist philosophy: read the room, hip-hop mornings, Tejano and cumbia afternoons, worship on Sunday open.
Chair rental policy: Darius and Andre $275/week, due the 15th, Ty pays nothing during apprenticeship.
Client note protocol: log the cut, the guard steps, the preferred barber, and any allergy in Airtable after each visit.
McNichols plan: two-chair start, wash station north wall, retail shelf by the window, soft open March 27.
Vendor terms: Pinnacle order windows the 1st and 15th, UPS delivery, substitute policy on backorders.
Community: Cuts Before Christmas — free kids' cuts, El Sol food, all hands, Dec 19 at the Livernois shop.
